# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: three-tier-vpc
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    name: three-tier-vpc
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL

- name: web-tier-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    name: web-tier-subnet
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.1.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    enableFlowLogs: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

- name: app-tier-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    name: app-tier-subnet
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.2.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    enableFlowLogs: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

- name: db-tier-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    name: db-tier-subnet
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.3.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    enableFlowLogs: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

# Firewall: Allow HTTP/HTTPS to web tier only from external
- name: allow-web-ingress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: allow-web-ingress
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    targetTags:
      - web-tier
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "80"
          - "443"

# Firewall: Allow app tier traffic only from web tier subnet
- name: allow-app-from-web
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: allow-app-from-web
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - "10.1.0.0/24"
    targetTags:
      - app-tier
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "8080"
          - "8443"

# Firewall: Allow db tier traffic only from app tier subnet
- name: allow-db-from-app
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: allow-db-from-app
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - "10.2.0.0/24"
    targetTags:
      - db-tier
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "3306"
          - "5432"

# Deny all other ingress by default (explicit deny rule)
- name: deny-all-ingress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: deny-all-ingress
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 65534
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    denied:
      - IPProtocol: ALL

# Allow internal health check probes from GCP ranges
- name: allow-health-checks
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: allow-health-checks
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 900
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - "35.191.0.0/16"
      - "130.211.0.0/22"
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP

# Allow IAP for secure SSH access instead of opening port 22 broadly
- name: allow-iap-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: allow-iap-ssh
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 900
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - "35.235.240.0/20"
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "22"

outputs:
- name: vpcSelfLink
  value: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
- name: webSubnetSelfLink
  value: $(ref.web-tier-subnet.selfLink)
- name: appSubnetSelfLink
  value: $(ref.app-tier-subnet.selfLink)
- name: dbSubnetSelfLink
  value: $(ref.db-tier-subnet.selfLink)
